content.en:
"My strength is too weak, not to mention the weakest, it is estimated to be about the same, and once those fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms discover me, I am afraid that they will instantly obliterate me. I'm worth 10 points for them!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

10 points may seem like a small amount, but why don't they do it!

Moreover, maybe you can also find treasures from the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and then you can make a lot of money!

Therefore, unless it is an acquaintance or a great ancestor who is too benevolent, other fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms will definitely take action when they see the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

"Let that blue wolf copy the body to explore first, you can't leave this copy body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As long as one of the duplicate bodies does not fall, he can use the ability to copy the body and reproduce the other duplicate bodies.

However, only one's own real body can be copied to earn Contribution Points.

If this replica body fell, he would not dare to appear in front of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor again, otherwise Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor would definitely be able to detect the abnormality.

After all, he carries that token on his body, and he can sense some situations, otherwise there is no way to record the contribution value!

Once it falls and then replicates, it is exposed!

Therefore, he had to ensure that his true body copy body did not fall before he could obtain benefits from the Silver Heng Heavenly Ancestor.

Moreover, there is still a Golden God Armor Stone on this replica body, if it falls, it will also be a big loss!

......

In the following days, Ye Tian tried his best to hide this replica body, directly hiding it in the deepest part of the mountain range of the Evil Blue Land, erasing everything.

Even if it was a high-level immeasurable lifeform of the fifth stage, if he didn't explore carefully, even if he came here, he wouldn't be able to find him.

And Ye Tian's blue wolf copy body is mainly to go out to find resources, Yinheng Tianzu gave a list of some resources, and many of the resources on it can be exchanged for contribution points.

Some are even directly worth 10,000 contribution points, and less can be exchanged for 0.1 contribution points.

Although killing the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms can earn a lot of contribution points, Ye Tian didn't dare to have this idea, the difference in strength was really too big!

Rumble!!!!

In the distance, the fluctuations of the battle between two fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms came.

After Ye Tian sensed it, he immediately changed direction, otherwise with the strength of his current copy body, he wouldn't even be able to withstand the aftermath!

this day.

Ye Tian finally had a harvest.

"Stygian Golden Grass, worth 3 contribution points!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

There is not just one Stygian Golden Grass here, but dozens of them, with a total value of hundreds of contribution points!

However, it was a fourth-stage creature guarding the Stygian Grass.

"You have to let the real body copy the body to shoot!"

Ye Tian muttered.

So, he made another copy of the real body in the vicinity.

Soon, a true god replica body was condensed.

"Do it!"

Ye Tian directly attacked, killed this fourth-stage creature in a very short time, seized the Stygian Golden Grass here, and then threw it to the Blue Wolf to copy the body.

Immediately, the blue wolf copied its body and quickly left.

"There is a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform here, and the speed is so fast!"

Ye Tian released his breath to attract the attention of the other party, and used it as a cover for the blue wolf to leave.

Sure enough, the other party directly ignored the third stage of the blue wolf replication body, thinking that this was just a frightened creature.

The other party came directly towards Ye Tian's side, wanting to see the situation.

Seeing this, Ye Tian directly annihilated his duplicate body.

Airplanes!

A figure descended here, and it was a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform.

He looked around and frowned slightly: "There was a battle, and there was still the aura of the golden grass, but the aura of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform disappeared. It looks like self-annihilation, but it's not as stupid as Great Ancestor, it should be some kind of special way to escape!"

He searched around again, but unfortunately found nothing, and left directly.

In the following days, Ye Tian used this method to send all kinds of resources he found to the real body copy body holding the Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor token.

In this way, the contribution value in his hands is increasing.

However, compared to those high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fifth stage, the speed at which he gained contribution points was certainly not fast.

His only advantage was that he had little competition, and he didn't need to fight other fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Somewhere in the Evil Blue Lands.

Ye Tian's dark blue wolf copied his body, and suddenly found a treasure of great value to him.

It was a blood-red giant tree, barely noticeable unless it was approached.

"Could this be the Infinite Blood Spirit Tree?"

Ye Tian said with a short breath.

If it is really this treasure, then his harvest this time will be huge!

The Immeasurable Blood Spirit Tree has the same effect as the Immeasurable Blood Golden Stone, but the Immeasurable Blood Spirit Tree is even rarer, and it is a legendary thing in the Xuanqi Territory.

The Great Ancestors could extract a substance called Immeasurable Blood Spiritual Liquid from the Immeasurable Blood Spirit Tree, and the Immeasurable Blood Spiritual Liquid could allow the high-level Immeasurable Lifeforms of the Fourth Stage to quickly complete the whole body refining, and the effect was more than a hundred times and a thousand times that of the Immeasurable Blood Stone.

Other than that.

Among the lists listed by Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor was the Infinite Blood Spirit Tree, one of which could be exchanged for 300 contribution points.

"There's no point in exchanging the Immeasurable Blood Spirit Tree for 300 contribution points, if I use it to cultivate, I can impact the second full-body tempering in a short period of time!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Using the resources of the Evil Blue Land to cultivate, Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor did not say no.

Moreover, he could completely use other true bodies to copy his body to cultivate, and without the existence of the token, Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor did not know, so there was no risk.

"Put away this immeasurable blood spirit tree first!"

Ye Tian carefully collected this immeasurable blood spirit tree little by little.

Soon, the Infinite Blood Spirit Tree fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Then, Ye Tian began to extract the immeasurable blood spirit liquid of the Immeasurable Blood Spirit Tree.

Drop after drop of immeasurable blood spirit liquid was extracted, and a total of tens of thousands of drops of immeasurable blood spirit liquid were extracted.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian found a place that was relatively safe, and then copied a real body to copy the body, and then let this copy body practice here to refine the immeasurable blood spirit liquid.

"Let's try it!"

Ye Tian took out a drop of immeasurable blood spiritual liquid, swallowed it in one gulp, and slowly refined it, refining it with immeasurable blood to refine his whole body.

Rumble!!!!

The unimaginable effect appeared, and his whole body was tempered at an extremely fast speed, which was far faster than before.

"With such an effect, it won't be long before I can complete the second full-body tempering!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
